en: "Then bring near to you Aaron your brother, and his sons with him, from among the people of Israel, to serve me as priests- Aaron and Aaron's sons, Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.
zh: “你要從以色列人中使你的哥哥亞倫和他的眾子，就是亞倫和他的眾子：拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒、以他瑪，都一同來到你面前，作事奉我的祭司。

en: And you shall make holy garments for Aaron your brother, for glory and for beauty.
zh: 你要為你哥哥亞倫做聖衣，使他有榮耀，有華美。

en: You shall speak to all the skillful, whom I have filled with a spirit of skill, that they make Aaron's garments to consecrate him for my priesthood.
zh: 你又要吩咐所有心中有智慧的，就是我用智慧的靈充滿的，給亞倫做衣服，使他成聖，作事奉我的祭司。

en: These are the garments that they shall make: a breastpiece, an ephod, a robe, a coat of checker work, a turban, and a sash. They shall make holy garments for Aaron your brother and his sons to serve me as priests.
zh: 這些就是他們要做的衣服：胸牌、以弗得、長外袍、雜色內袍、禮冠、腰帶。他們要為你哥哥亞倫和他的眾子做聖衣，使他們作事奉我的祭司。

en: They shall receive gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen.
zh: 他們要拿金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻去做。

en: "And they shall make the ephod of gold, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and of fine twined linen, skillfully worked.
zh: “他們要拿金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻，用巧工來做以弗得。

en: It shall have two shoulder pieces attached to its two edges, so that it may be joined together.
zh: 以弗得要有兩條肩帶，連接著兩端，好使它相連在一起。

en: And the skillfully woven band on it shall be made like it and be of one piece with it, of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen.
zh: 以弗得上面的帶子，它的巧工要和以弗得一樣，用來束上以弗得，要用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做成。

en: You shall take two onyx stones, and engrave on them the names of the sons of Israel,
zh: 你要取兩塊紅寶石，把以色列眾子的名字刻在上面，

en: six of their names on the one stone, and the names of the remaining six on the other stone, in the order of their birth.
zh: 六個名字在一塊寶石上，其餘六個名字在另一塊寶石上，都是照著他們出生的次序。

en: As a jeweler engraves signets, so shall you engrave the two stones with the names of the sons of Israel. You shall enclose them in settings of gold filigree.
zh: 好像寶石雕刻匠刻印章一樣，你要把以色列眾子的名字刻在這兩塊寶石上，要把它們鑲嵌在金槽中。

en: And you shall set the two stones on the shoulder pieces of the ephod, as stones of remembrance for the sons of Israel. And Aaron shall bear their names before the LORD on his two shoulders for remembrance.
zh: 你要把這兩塊寶石安放在以弗得的肩帶上，作以色列民的記念石。亞倫在耶和華面前，用兩肩擔當他們的名字，作為記念。

en: You shall make settings of gold filigree,
zh: 你要做金槽，

en: and two chains of pure gold, twisted like cords; and you shall attach the corded chains to the settings.
zh: 和兩條純金的鍊子，像做繩子一樣擰成，把這像繩子一樣的鍊子放置在二槽上。

en: "You shall make a breastpiece of judgment, in skilled work. In the style of the ephod you shall make it- of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen shall you make it.
zh: “你要用巧工做一個作判斷用的胸牌，像以弗得的做法一樣，要用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做成。

en: It shall be square and doubled, a span its length and a span its breadth.
zh: 胸牌要四方的，雙層的，長二十二公分，寬二十二公分。

en: You shall set in it four rows of stones. A row of sardius, topaz, and carbuncle shall be the first row;
zh: 你要在胸牌上面鑲上四行寶石：第一行是紅寶石、黃玉、翡翠；

en: and the second row an emerald, a sapphire, and a diamond;
zh: 第二行是綠寶石、藍寶石、金鋼石；

en: and the third row a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;
zh: 第三行是黃瑪瑙、白瑪瑙、紫晶；

en: and the fourth row a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper. They shall be set in gold filigree.
zh: 第四行是水蒼玉、紅瑪瑙、碧玉。這些寶石都是鑲在金槽裡。

en: There shall be twelve stones with their names according to the names of the sons of Israel. They shall be like signets, each engraved with its name, for the twelve tribes.
zh: 按著以色列眾子的名字，這些寶石要有十二塊；按著他們的名字刻印章，按他們的名字各代表十二個支派。

en: You shall make for the breastpiece twisted chains like cords, of pure gold.
zh: 你要在胸牌上做純金的鍊子，像做繩子一樣擰成。

en: And you shall make for the breastpiece two rings of gold, and put the two rings on the two edges of the breastpiece.
zh: 你要在胸牌上做兩個金環，把這兩個金環安在胸牌的兩端之上。

en: And you shall put the two cords of gold in the two rings at the edges of the breastpiece.
zh: 你要把那兩條金鍊子穿在胸牌兩端的兩個環子裡。

en: The two ends of the two cords you shall attach to the two settings of filigree, and so attach it in front to the shoulder pieces of the ephod.
zh: 你又要把那兩條鍊子的另兩端接在兩槽上，連在以弗得前面的肩帶上。

en: You shall make two rings of gold, and put them at the two ends of the breastpiece, on its inside edge next to the ephod.
zh: 你又要做兩個金環，安在胸牌下邊的兩端，就是靠近以弗得裡面的邊緣上。

en: And you shall make two rings of gold, and attach them in front to the lower part of the two shoulder pieces of the ephod, at its seam above the skillfully woven band of the ephod.
zh: 你又要做兩個金環，把它們安在以弗得前面兩條肩帶的下面，靠近相接的地方，在以弗得巧工織成的帶子上面。

en: And they shall bind the breastpiece by its rings to the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, so that it may lie on the skillfully woven band of the ephod, so that the breastpiece shall not come loose from the ephod.
zh: 你要用紫藍色細線把胸牌的環子繫在以弗得的環子上，使胸牌貼在以弗得巧工織成的帶子上，免得胸牌從以弗得上脫下來。

en: So Aaron shall bear the names of the sons of Israel in the breastpiece of judgment on his heart, when he goes into the Holy Place, to bring them to regular remembrance before the LORD.
zh: 亞倫進入聖所的時候，要把作決斷用的胸牌，上面有以色列眾子的名字，帶在胸前，在耶和華面前常作記念。

en: And in the breastpiece of judgment you shall put the Urim and the Thummim, and they shall be on Aaron's heart, when he goes in before the LORD. Thus Aaron shall bear the judgment of the people of Israel on his heart before the LORD regularly.
zh: 你要把烏陵和土明放在作決斷用的胸牌裡。亞倫進入耶和華面前的時候，它們要帶在胸前；這樣，亞倫就在耶和華面前常常把以色列眾子的決斷帶在胸前。

en: "You shall make the robe of the ephod all of blue.
zh: “你要做以弗得的長外袍，全件要紫藍色。

en: It shall have an opening for the head in the middle of it, with a woven binding around the opening, like the opening in a garment, so that it may not tear.
zh: 在長外袍的正中，頭部的地方，要有一個領口，領口的周圍要有領邊，是用紡織的細工織成，如同戰袍的領口一樣，免得長外袍破裂。

en: On its hem you shall make pomegranates of blue and purple and scarlet yarns, around its hem, with bells of gold between them,
zh: 在長外袍下襬的周圍，你要用藍色紫色朱紅色線做石榴，在長外袍下襬周圍的石榴中間，要綴上金鈴。

en: a golden bell and a pomegranate, a golden bell and a pomegranate, around the hem of the robe.
zh: 在長外袍下襬的周圍綴上一個金鈴、一個石榴、一個金鈴、一個石榴，

en: And it shall be on Aaron when he ministers, and its sound shall be heard when he goes into the Holy Place before the LORD, and when he comes out, so that he does not die.
zh: 長外袍要穿在亞倫的身上，好作事奉。他進入聖所到耶和華面前，以及出來的時候，他的聲音必被聽見，免得他死亡。

en: "You shall make a plate of pure gold and engrave on it, like the engraving of a signet, 'Holy to the LORD.'
zh: “你要用精金做一面牌子，在牌上像刻印章般刻著：‘歸耶和華為聖’。

en: And you shall fasten it on the turban by a cord of blue. It shall be on the front of the turban.
zh: 你要用一條紫藍色細線把牌子繫住，好使它安在禮冠上，就是在禮冠的前面。

en: It shall be on Aaron's forehead, and Aaron shall bear any guilt from the holy things that the people of Israel consecrate as their holy gifts. It shall regularly be on his forehead, that they may be accepted before the LORD.
zh: 這牌要在亞倫的額上，亞倫要擔當干犯聖物的罪過，這些聖物是以色列人在一切聖禮物上分別為聖的；這牌要常在亞倫的額上，好使他們在耶和華面前可以得蒙悅納。

en: "You shall weave the coat in checker work of fine linen, and you shall make a turban of fine linen, and you shall make a sash embroidered with needlework.
zh: 你要用細麻線編織雜色內袍，用細麻布做禮冠，又用刺繡的手工做腰帶。

en: "For Aaron's sons you shall make coats and sashes and caps. You shall make them for glory and beauty.
zh: “你也要為亞倫的兒子做內袍，為他們做腰帶，又為他們做頭巾，使他們有榮耀，有華美。

en: And you shall put them on Aaron your brother, and on his sons with him, and shall anoint them and ordain them and consecrate them, that they may serve me as priests.
zh: 你要把這些給你哥哥亞倫和他的兒子們穿上，又要膏抹他們，按立他們，把他們分別為聖，好使他們可以作我的祭司。

en: You shall make for them linen undergarments to cover their naked flesh. They shall reach from the hips to the thighs;
zh: 你要給他們做白麻布褲子，遮蓋裸體，褲子遮蓋腰間，直到大腿。

en: and they shall be on Aaron and on his sons when they go into the tent of meeting or when they come near the altar to minister in the Holy Place, lest they bear guilt and die. This shall be a statute forever for him and for his offspring after him.
zh: 亞倫和他兒子進入會幕，或走近祭壇，在聖所裡事奉的時候，都必須穿上褲子，免得他們擔當罪過而死。這要給亞倫和他的後裔作永遠的條例。”
